title: Mildly Savory Croatian Poppy Seed Pilaf
description: A savory, pillowy, brunch-mood Croatian dish featuring poppy seeds, this pilaf is perfect for a weekend morning, and it is vegan-friendly.
instructions: Preheat the oven to 375 degrees Fahrenheit.
In a large saucepan, heat the olive oil over medium heat.
Add the chopped onion and cook until it is translucent.
Add the minced garlic and cook for one minute.
Add the sliced mushrooms and cook until they release their moisture and start to brown.
Add the toasted poppy seeds and cook for one minute.
Add the rice and cook for two minutes, stirring constantly.
Add the vegetable broth, salt, and black pepper, and bring to a boil.
Cover the saucepan with a tight-fitting lid and transfer it to the preheated oven.
Bake for 25 minutes, or until the liquid is absorbed and the rice is tender.
Remove the pilaf from the oven and stir in the chopped parsley.
